name: Thai Sausage-Chiang Mai Style Bwht68a
recipeIngredient: 4 Large Dried Chilies, soaked in water until soft
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn the sausage casing inside out and rub with a mixture of 1/4 cup salt and water. Rub gently but thoroughly.
2. Rinse the casing several times until it becomes odorless. Then turn it right side out and squeeze out excess water.
3. Blend softened dried chilies, 1/2 tsp salt, lemon grass, cilantro roots, Kaffir lime zest, galanga, garlic, and onions in a blender until a paste forms.
4. Mix the chili paste with pork, Kaffir lime leaves, cilantro leaves, and fish sauce until well combined.
5. Tie one end of the casing to form a sausage shape and stuff with the pork mixture.
6. Tie another knot at the other end to close it.
7. Poke a few holes in the sausage using clean needles where bubbles are present inside.
8. Charbroil or fry over medium-low heat until golden brown and fully cooked, occasionally poking more holes to prevent bursting.
9. Slice into 1/2" thick pieces. Serve with cooked sticky rice and raw vegetables. Makes about 5 servings.
